user_system_path: Seam #404 — the send carries the finished work. Builds on #402's review-gated one-tap send: the budget doc / forecast / memo the brain drafted rides with the email as an attachment, surfaced read-only on the Slack review modal so the sign-off shows exactly what leaves the mailbox. Attachment content is the generated artifact, never fabricated. Bounded by count (5) and size (5 MB/file, 10 MB total) caps validated at the boundary. Reuses the existing executeAction send layer (Gmail multipart/mixed, Outlook Graph fileAttachment, Resend) — no new send path. Live send stays behind ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND. Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — providers mocked at the boundary; Slack adapter test-safe.
allowed_files_raw: Seam #404: attachment plumbing end-to-end — a dependency-free lib/email/attachments.ts (normalize/cap, RFC 2822 multipart builder, Graph + Resend mappers), the EmailArtifact + WorkdayPresenceDraft types, the Gmail/Outlook/Resend send clients, executeAction's email case, the seed-from-directive draft mapping, and the Slack review modal/card surface, plus control-plane + docs.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema (supabase/**) and no dependency changes (package.json / lock) — attachments reuse the existing executeAction + provider clients with the SDKs already installed.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run build && npm run lint
required_browser_proof: Harness-proven (full workday-presence/slack/conviction/email/integrations/app-api-slack suites + new attachments + execute-action + modal tests). Live owner validation is owner-side: set ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND=true, trigger a guardian ping on a draft with attachments, tap Review & send, sign off, confirm a real Gmail send with the file attached — BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT until then.
acceptance_condition: Attachments thread end-to-end: the generated artifact's attachments flow through the draft, are listed read-only in the Slack review modal, ride the executeAction send (Gmail multipart/mixed), are bounded by count + size caps, and a malformed/oversized list is dropped at the boundary; no new send path and no auto-send; gate:continuity + build + lint green.
anti_regression_checks: attachment content is the generated artifact, never fabricated
count + size caps enforced at the boundary
no send path without the existing #402 modal sign-off (no auto-send)
stop_condition: Stop when the draft PR for #404 is open with CI green, or BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT on the owner-side live send validation.
next_command: Owner: set ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND=true in prod, trigger a guardian ping on a draft with attachments, tap Review & send, sign off, and confirm a real Gmail send with the file attached. Separately still open: the free external 15-min cron for guardian firing cadence; #402 PR #403 awaits the same live send validation.
